## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What did you expect to happen?

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment
- Plugin version: <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- Pi-hole version: <!-- e.g. 6.4 core, 6.5 FTL -->
- Stream Deck software version: <!-- e.g. 6.8 -->
- Stream Deck hardware: <!-- e.g. Stream Deck MK.2 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. Windows 11 -->

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
